title: Fibonacci Sequence
description:
Write a function to calculate the nth Fibonacci number. The Fibonacci sequence is defined as follows:

F(0) = 0, F(1) = 1
F(n) = F(n-1) + F(n-2) for n > 1

Return the value of F(n).
hints: Use the golden ratio formula for O(1) solution
Think about how to avoid recomputing the same values
Can you solve this iteratively instead of recursively?
